# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that runs on self-hosted runners in our datacenter. The workflow executes custom build scripts and deployment commands provided by developers. This gives our team flexibility to run any build process they need on our infrastructure.

Write secure code.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build and Deployment Workflow

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Run custom build script
        run: |
          ./custom_build_script.sh

      - name: Run deployment command
        run: |
          ./deployment_command.sh

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment_artifacts
          path: ./deployment_artifacts

      - name: Download artifacts from previous job
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v2
        with:
          name: deployment_artifacts
          path: ./previous_deployment_artifacts

      - name: Run custom deployment script
        run: |
          ./custom_deployment_script.sh

  deploy:
    needs: build-and-deploy
    runs-on: self-hosted
    steps:
      - name: Deploy to production
        run: |
          ./deploy_to_production.sh
